title: Color Fidelity (0x75)
description: Color fidelity triplet layout. (Do not include triplet length or TID here.)

enumMap.01: Stop presentation at point of first color exception and report exception
enumMap.02: Do not stop presentation because of color exceptions

elements.name: RepCoEx
elements.description: Color exception reporting rule if exception does not stop presentation

elements.name: ColSub
elements.description: Substitution rule if exception does not stop presentation

enumMap.01: For color-value exceptions, any color substitution is permitted; for CMR exceptions, use presentation system defaults
